\tt\mc

\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \centerline{\bf Towers of Hanoi (Ruby)} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \begin{quote} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \noindent 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ This program gives an answer to the following famous problem (towers of 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ Hanoi). 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ There is a legend that when one of the temples in Hanoi was constructed, 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ three poles were erected and a tower consisting of 64 golden discs was 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ arranged on one pole, their sizes decreasing regularly from bottom to top. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ The monks were to move the tower of discs to the opposite pole, moving 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ only one at a time, and never putting any size disc above a smaller one. 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ The job was to be done in the minimum numbers of moves. What strategy for 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ moving discs will accomplish this optimum transfer? 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \end{quote} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ % end of TeX mode 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \hrulefill\ hanoi.rb \ \hrulefill
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }8{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc の数 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}disc{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }Array.new(3){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'173}{\tt\mc \ }Array.new(ARRAY,{\tt\mc \ }0){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\char'175}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc に関するデータの置き場所 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}def{\tt\mc \ }init{\tt\_}array{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc に関するデータの初期化 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY.times{\tt\mc \ }do{\tt\mc \ }|j|

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[0][j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }ARRAY{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}{\tt\mc \ }j

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[1][j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[2][j]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }end

\noindent
\mbox{}end

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}counter{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 移動回数カウンタ \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}def{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\_}result{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 結果の表示 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}counter{\tt\mc \ }+={\tt\mc \ }1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }puts{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt\#}{\tt\#}{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}counter{\tt\char'175}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt -}{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }3.times{\tt\mc \ }do{\tt\mc \ }|i|

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}[{\tt\#}{\tt\char'173}i{\tt\char'175}]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }ARRAY.times{\tt\mc \ }do{\tt\mc \ }|j|

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }if{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[i][j]{\tt\mc \ }!={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}{\tt\#}{\tt\char'173}{\tt\$}disc[i][j]{\tt\char'175}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt "}

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }else

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }break

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }end

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }end

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }puts

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }end

\noindent
\mbox{}end

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}ptr{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }[0,{\tt\mc \ }0,{\tt\mc \ }0]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ disc 移動用ポインタ \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}def{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}one{\tt\_}disc(i,{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 1枚の disc を pole $i$ から \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $j$ に移動する \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ptr[i]{\tt\mc \ }{\tt -}={\tt\mc \ }1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[j][{\tt\$}ptr[j]]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[i][{\tt\$}ptr[i]]

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}ptr[j]{\tt\mc \ }+={\tt\mc \ }1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\$}disc[i][{\tt\$}ptr[i]]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}end

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}def{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs(n,{\tt\mc \ }i,{\tt\mc \ }j,{\tt\mc \ }k){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 上から $n$ 枚目までの disc を \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $i$ から pole $j$ に \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole $k$ を経由して移動する \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }if{\tt\mc \ }n{\tt\mc \ }{\tt >}={\tt\mc \ }1

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs(n{\tt -}1,{\tt\mc \ }i,{\tt\mc \ }k,{\tt\mc \ }j)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 関数 {\tt move\_discs()} の中で \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ さらに自分自身が使われている。 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}one{\tt\_}disc(i,{\tt\mc \ }j){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ このような手法は「再帰的呼び \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }print{\tt\_}result{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ だし」といわれる。 \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }move{\tt\_}discs(n{\tt -}1,{\tt\mc \ }k,{\tt\mc \ }j,{\tt\mc \ }i)

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }end

\noindent
\mbox{}end

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \par\begin{center}\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi1}\quad\includegraphics[scale=0.3]{hanoi2}\end{center} 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#}
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ \noindent 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ たとえば、関数 {\tt move\_discs(4, 0, 1, 2)} を呼び出すことは、 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ 上図のような操作をすることに対応する。\hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}ptr[0]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }ARRAY

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}ptr[1]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\$}ptr[2]{\tt\mc \ }={\tt\mc \ }0

\noindent
\mbox{}\hfill

\noindent
\mbox{}init{\tt\_}array

\noindent
\mbox{}move{\tt\_}discs(ARRAY,{\tt\mc \ }0,{\tt\mc \ }1,{\tt\mc \ }2){\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ {\tt ARRAY} 枚の disc を \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole 0 から pole 1 に \hfill 
\tt\mc 

\noindent
\mbox{}{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }{\tt\mc \ }\rm\mc {\tt\#} \ pole 2 を経由して移動する \hfill 

\tt\mc
